<?xml version="1.0"?> <ruleset xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="vendor/squizlabs/php_codesniffer/phpcs.xsd" > <file>config</file> <file>src</file> <file>tests</file> <exclude-pattern>src/Resources/*</exclude-pattern> <exclude-pattern>*.blade.php</exclude-pattern> <arg value="p"/> <rule ref="PSR12" /> </ruleset>
